enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song reflects themes of love and longing, capturing the essence of emotional connections.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Varumayin Niram Sivappu, the song plays during a pivotal moment that emphasizes the characters' emotional struggles.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the legendary voices of S.Janaki and S.P.Balasubramaniam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music was composed by the renowned MS Viswanathan.

When was this song released?

The song was released in 1980.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sippi Irukkuthu Muthum Irukkuthu, the characters express their deep emotional turmoil and longing for connection. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it a memorable piece in the film Varumayin Niram Sivappu. It beautifully captures the essence of love, reflecting the bittersweet moments of life. The collaboration of S.Janaki and S.P.Balasubramaniam adds a unique charm, making it a timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sippi Irukkuthu Muthum Irukkuthu from Varumayin Niram Sivappu is a timeless classic that resonates with the heart. The enchanting vocals of S.Janaki and S.P.Balasubramaniam, combined with MS Viswanathan's mesmerizing composition, create an unforgettable listening experience. Dive into the nostalgic vibes of this song that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: There is a shell, there is a pearl, but there is no time to see them, oh queen.
There are thoughts, there is a sound, but there is no time to sing poetry, oh queen.
Sounds, na na naa... because of you, the music is mmhm hmm, I am here.
Because of you, the sounds are music, I am here.
Na na naa na na, come on say it once again, na na naa na na mm... smiling brings heaven, give me that... okay? It's just like that, the need is a beautiful sight.
Thinking about that, na na na na la la laa la la, standing in my heart, coming and going, nananana na na naa... thananaa... la la laa... thananaa.
Beautiful... who created this enchantment? Tamil? Sweetness? Poet?!
Sounds ahahaa, because of you ahahaa, music ahahaa, I am here ahahaa...

Now let's see... thanana thanana na na Mm? What about the night and the sun? thananana thanana nanna na na, when I see you, the blooming flowers... thanana naa na thanana naa na, oh my! thananana thanana naa na thana ah! The night and the land dance beautifully, well done! The world of poetry will be amazed... seeing you, the poet's heart is a bit moved.
In the sounds given... my heart... you know... I spoke.
There is a shell, there is a pearl, but the time to see them has come now.
There are thoughts, there is a sound, but when will the poetry be sung?
